title: cirsium × viridipurpureum
intro: Cirsium × viridipurpureum, also known as the green plume thistle, is a hybrid species of thistle that is a cross between Cirsium rivulare and Cirsium pannonicum. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Cirsium × viridipurpureum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting digestive health. Cirsium × viridipurpureum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
